testcase.name: postgresPathSuccessReturnsStoredRows
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-24T21:27:31.324+05:30 INFO 98956 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : check-run-store-pool - Starting... 2026-03-24T21:27:31.324+05:30 INFO 98956 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : check-run-store-pool - Start completed. 2026-03-24T21:27:31.343+05:30 INFO 98956 --- [ main] org.flywaydb.core.FlywayExecutor : Database: jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/contracts (PostgreSQL 18.3) 2026-03-24T21:27:31.346+05:30 WARN 98956 --- [ main] o.f.c.internal.database.base.Database : Flyway upgrade recommended: PostgreSQL 18.3 is newer than this version of Flyway and support has not been tested. testcase.name: postgresPathSchemaMismatchThrowsQueryFailure

testcase.name: postgresPathNetworkFailureReturnsUnavailableStoreException
testcase.system-out:
2026-03-24T21:27:31.577+05:30 INFO 98956 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : check-run-store-pool - Starting... 2026-03-24T21:27:31.577+05:30 INFO 98956 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : check-run-store-pool - Start completed. 2026-03-24T21:27:33.103+05:30 ERROR 98956 --- [ main] c.ideas.contracts.service.CheckRunStore : event=db_operation_failed component=check_run_store operation=initialize_check_store db_target=jdbc:postgresql://127.0.0.1:1/contracts?connectTimeout=1&socketTimeout=1 contract_id=- commit_sha=- sql_state=- sql_vendor_code=- error_type=FlywaySqlException error_message=Unable to obtain connection from database: check-run-store-pool - Connection is not available, request timed out after 254ms (total=0, active=0, idle=0, waiting=0) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- SQL State : 08001 Error Code : 0 Message : Connection to 127.0.0.1:1 refused. Check that the hostname and port are correct and that the postmaster is accepting TCP/IP connections.
2026-03-24T21:27:33.104+05:30 WARN 98956 --- [ main] c.ideas.contracts.service.CheckRunStore : event=check_store_init_deferred component=check_run_store db_target=jdbc:postgresql://127.0.0.1:1/contracts?connectTimeout=1&socketTimeout=1 message=Will retry on first checks request 2026-03-24T21:27:34.644+05:30 ERROR 98956 --- [ main] c.ideas.contracts.service.CheckRunStore : event=db_operation_failed component=check_run_store operation=initialize_check_store db_target=jdbc:postgresql://127.0.0.1:1/contracts?connectTimeout=1&socketTimeout=1 contract_id=- commit_sha=- sql_state=- sql_vendor_code=- error_type=FlywaySqlException error_message=Unable to obtain connection from database: check-run-store-pool - Connection is not available, request timed out after 254ms (total=0, active=0, idle=0, waiting=0) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- SQL State : 08001 Error Code : 0 Message : Connection to 127.0.0.1:1 refused. Check that the hostname and port are correct and that the postmaster is accepting TCP/IP connections.
2026-03-24T21:27:34.645+05:30 INFO 98956 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : check-run-store-pool - Shutdown initiated... 2026-03-24T21:27:35.650+05:30 WARN 98956 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : Timed-out waiting for add connection executor to shutdown 2026-03-24T21:27:35.651+05:30 INFO 98956 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : check-run-store-pool - Shutdown completed.
